import\('node-fetch'\).then\(\({default: fetch}\) => {
  fetch\('https://www.carqueryapi.com/api/0.3/?callback=&cmd=getTrims&make=Toyota&model=Corolla&year=2022&full_results=1', {headers:{'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0'}}\)
    .then\(r => r.text\(\)\)
    .then\(t => console.log\(t.substring\(0, 500\)\)\)
    .catch\(e => console.log\('Error:', e.message\)\)
}\)")
